headline: Clear calendar and empty comms — use this rare quiet day to drive the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR cycle.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so Monday metrics are available
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); fixing now avoids scrambling before next leadership review

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance AE-1079: 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket; evals is a key 26.4 deliverable and OKR-tracked initiative under Agents Big Rock. No due date means it risks slipping — own the momentum.

must_make_progress.task: Review latest Agents bi-weekly TR Confluence page and align your design doc with current evals positioning
must_make_progress.why: OKR page references evals demos and key 26.4 deliverables; ensure your doc reflects the latest scope and language

must_communicate_with.about: Sync on 'no ground truth' evaluation approach — confirm technical constraints and design assumptions before finalizing doc
Salesforce and Snowflake credential failures blocking your metrics dashboards

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into open escalations or high-priority customer cases.
Snowflake metrics are inaccessible (empty password) — cannot track agents-in-production or evals adoption trends.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of drifting given it's the only active ticket. Consider setting a target date today.
No Slack or email activity in 16h — unusually quiet; verify integrations are pulling data correctly.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations resolved or decisions made yet today — primary opportunity is restoring metrics visibility and advancing the evals design doc that underpins a key 26.4 deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption data is currently unavailable due to broken Snowflake credentials; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc is the most adoption-impactful work available today.

slack_summary: Quiet day with zero meetings and no inbound messages — ideal deep-work window. Top priority: make significant progress on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc), which is your only active Jira ticket and ties directly to 26.4 Agents deliverables. Also flag the broken Salesforce/Snowflake creds to IT so metrics are back before the next review cycle. No meetings today.
